<?php namespace Spatie\Ignition\Solutions\SolutionProviders; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\SolutionProviders\BadMethodCallSolutionProvider as BaseBadMethodCallSolutionProviderAlias; use Spatie\Ignition\Contracts\HasSolutionsForThrowable; class BadMethodCallSolutionProvider extends BaseBadMethodCallSolutionProviderAlias implements HasSolutionsForThrowable { }
